summary: Iteration 11: Phase 3 (6 Weeks Challenge improvements) and Phase 4 (Reviews/Bilans improvements) testing complete. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with Playwright.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 3: Challenge types (fixed/personal) fully implemented with proper badges
Phase 3: Personal participants support personal_start_date and personal_end_date
Phase 3: Week boolean toggles (week1...week6) working for quick completion marking
Phase 3: Challenge deletion properly removes all associated participants
Phase 4: Reviews page title correctly shows 'Bilans / Suivis'
Phase 4: Sidebar navigation correctly shows 'Bilans / Suivis'
Phase 4: review_type field (monthly, quarterly, semi-annually, annually) working
Phase 4: Type filter dropdown filters reviews by review_type correctly
Phase 4: Type badges displayed in review table rows (Mensuel, Trimestriel, etc.)
Phase 4: Member review_frequency selector in Add Member modal working
seed_data_creation: Tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 and Phase 4 features fully tested and working. Challenge page: Create fixed/personal challenges with checkins_goal, add participants with personal dates (for personal challenges), toggle week booleans, detailed check-in modal accessible via target icon. Reviews page: Title is 'Bilans / Suivis', type filter dropdown with Mensuel/Trimestriel/Semestriel/Annuel options, Type column in table with colored badges. Members page: review_frequency selector (Mensuel/Trimestriel/Semestriel/Annuel) in Add Member modal when reviews enabled.

phase3_challenge_types.create_personal_challenge: PASS - challenge_type='personal' with no fixed dates
phase3_challenge_types.dates_info_personal: PASS - 'Dates personnalisées par participant' text shown

phase3_personal_participants.dates_shown_in_ui: PASS - Personal dates visible under participant name
phase3_personal_participants.modal_date_inputs: PASS - 'Début personnel' and 'Fin personnel' inputs in modal

phase3_weekly_checkins.week_toggles_ui: PASS - Green checkmark buttons for completed weeks

phase4_member_review_frequency.frequency_selector: PASS - 'Fréquence du bilan' dropdown in member modal
